title: Toy Dart Gun with Suction-Cup Darts and Standing Targets for Children Blue Pistol Style Safe Indoor Outdoor Shooting Toy Set for Kids Handheld Plastic Projectile Game Family Fun
features: EXCITING ACTION PLAY – Bring endless adventure to indoor and outdoor fun with this toy dart gun set! The blue pistol-style dart gun and suction-cup darts invite children to enjoy imaginative shooting practice, building coordination and confidence.

SAFE SUCTION-CUP DARTS – Designed with soft suction-cup tips, these darts stick securely to included standing targets, making every shot satisfying and safe. Perfect for peace of mind during energetic play for children aged 3 and above.

EASY TO HANDLE DESIGN – Specially sized for small hands, the lightweight plastic dart gun is comfortable to grip and quick to load, encouraging independent play and skill development as kids aim for the black targets with white scoring markings.

FUN FOR ALL OCCASIONS – Whether playing solo, challenging friends, or gathering as a family, this projectile toy inspires healthy competition. Enjoy active playtime anywhere and bond through scoring games that boost focus and laughter.

COMPLETE SET FOR FAMILY PLAY – Includes dart gun, suction darts, and standing targets for instant play at home or outdoors. Recommended for kids from age 3 up. From Electoys, this pack brings colourful, safe fun to your child’s activities.
description: Product description Let your child’s imagination soar with this blue toy dart gun set, a delightful way to introduce energetic, screen-free fun! Specially designed for children ages 3 and up, this set brings playful excitement to both indoor and outdoor settings. The dart gun is perfectly sized for little hands, crafted from sturdy plastic with an easy-to-hold white grip and vibrant orange details. Soft, orange suction-cup darts make every shot stick smoothly to the set’s standing black targets, encouraging friendly competition and scoring games that help develop focus and coordination. Children will love the satisfying click of loading and firing, while parents appreciate the safety of the gentle projectiles. Set up the included targets on a table or garden patch, and let your child enjoy hours of engaging play – whether going solo, taking turns with friends, or organising a family dart tournament. The visible white scoring marks keep things fair and add a real sense of achievement to every game. Every element of this projectile toy set is designed to create inclusive, laughter-filled play. The complete kit ensures your child can jump straight into action, with all components made for easy use and lasting fun. With its cheerful colours, kid-safe materials, and suitability for ages 3 and above, this toy dart gun and target set from Electoys adds a spark of joy to any playroom or garden. Discover a world of creative, skill-building entertainment that brings families together for memorable moments. Safety Warning Keep away from fire

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Develop motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and focus
